lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

Get ready to be impressed by this absolute gem! This car is in truly pristine, showroom condition and looks like it just rolled off the assembly line. Every detail has been meticulously maintained, offering a flawless driving experience that feels brand new. You won't find a better-kept example of this model anywhere!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several scratches and small dents. The interior shows visible wear on the seats and carpets. The engine runs, but the vehicle will need routine maintenance.
The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior shows heavy wear and tear. It has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be operational.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. It currently has difficulty starting, and the engine runs roughly with an audible knock. The transmission slips between gears, and the brakes are near the end of their life. Externally, there is significant rust on the quarter panels, a large dent in the passenger door, and the clear coat is peeling across the roof and hood. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with several tears in the seats and a persistent musty odor. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited as a parts vehicle or a major restoration project for someone with the necessary tools and time.

This vehicle is in impeccable, mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a new car. The exterior features original factory paint with a perfect finish, free of any chips or blemishes. Inside, the leather interior is pristine, showing no signs of wear, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. It has been meticulously serviced and kept in a climate-controlled garage, making it a perfect example for a collector or enthusiast.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure peak performance and reliability. Featuring a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior finish, it represents a sophisticated choice for the discerning driver seeking a dependable pre-owned vehicle without compromise.

Hey! 👋 Looking for a reliable ride that won't let you down? I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s still in fantastic shape! It’s been well-loved and runs so smoothly. Whether you're hitting the highway or just cruising around town, this beauty is ready for its next adventure. I’d love for it to go to a good home, so I've priced it to move quickly! Drop me a message if you want to come see it!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant equipped with individual throttle bodies. The 6-speed manual gearbox provides crisp engagement, paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. Recent preventative maintenance includes a complete VANOS service and rear subframe reinforcement to address common chassis stress points. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing refreshed bushings to preserve the platform's legendary handling characteristics. While the finish shows light road wear, the mechanical core is dialed in for performance, offering linear acceleration and a visceral 8,000 RPM redline experience.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable performance. Minor cosmetic wear. Title in hand.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-maintained, reliable daily driver that still turns heads. The exterior features a deep, lustrous paint finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only minor signs of road use consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean, featuring supple leather seating with minimal wear and a full suite of electronics that function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in strong health; it has followed a strict maintenance schedule, resulting in a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that pulls cleanly. The alloy wheels are in excellent shape, paired with tires that offer plenty of tread for the seasons ahead. Every detail, from the crisp audio system to the ice-cold climate control, has been verified for performance. This is a complete, honest package ready for the road.

This vehicle represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver, offering a harmonious blend of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, it exhibits a level of mechanical and aesthetic integrity that exceeds standard expectations for its class. We invite you to experience the refined handling and superior comfort of this well-preserved automobile, now offered at a competitive valuation reflecting its superior upkeep and road-ready condition.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers the performance and reliability expected of its class. Every system has been thoroughly vetted to ensure compliance with our rigorous operational standards. We invite you to experience the refined handling and superior comfort of this distinguished automobile.

Hey friends! 👋 I'm selling my reliable car and it's looking for a great new home! 🚗 It's been well-loved and is in really solid shape, running like a dream. It's super clean and ready to hit the road for your next weekend getaway or daily commute. I've honestly enjoyed every mile in it, and I know you will too! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46-generation M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW's high-revving S54 platform. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six pulls strongly to its 8,000 RPM redline, benefiting from the precision of six individual throttle bodies and a recently serviced Vanos system
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minimal cosmetic wear. Ready to drive.

This meticulously maintained sedan offers a refined driving experience that balances luxury with everyday practicality. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like gloss, showing only the minor, superficial character marks consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium leather seating is supple and well-preserved, and the dashboard remains free of sun damage or cracks. Mechanically, this vehicle is in excellent health, boasting a complete service history with recent preventative maintenance, including a fresh oil service and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. All electronic features—including the intuitive infotainment system, heated seats, and advanced safety sensors—operate flawlessly. The ride is quiet and composed, with a responsive engine and smooth shifting that inspire confidence on both city streets and long highway stretches. This is a turn-key vehicle ready for its next chapter.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a clean interior and a robust mechanical profile, it has been thoroughly vetted to meet our rigorous standards for quality and safety. A distinguished choice for those who demand excellence and dependable engineering in their daily drive.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional caliber, this model exemplifies mechanical integrity and refined aesthetics. Meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional. This unit represents a premier opportunity to acquire a well-preserved asset that balances durability with classic prestige.

Hi there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in wonderful shape, ready to hit the road with its next owner. It drives like a dream and has been well-loved over the years. Perfect for your daily commute or weekend getaways! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to tell you more about it!

This E92-generation M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering 414 hp through a precise 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains remarkably composed, benefitting from functional Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and the M Variable Differential Lock, which ensures optimal torque distribution across the rear axle. Recent service includes a high-pressure VANOS system inspection and fresh synthetic lubricants. While the exterior shows minor road-wear consistent with its mileage, the mechanical vitals—including throttle actuators and rod bearings—are within spec, maintaining the visceral performance and 8,4
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort, making it an ideal choice for a discerning driver. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor signs of careful road use, while the smoke-free interior features clean, premium upholstery and fully functional electronics. Mechanically sound and consistently serviced, it provides a smooth, confident driving experience with responsive handling and a quiet cabin. Every detail, from the tread on the tires to the clarity of the infotainment screen, reflects a history of responsible ownership and regular care. It is a reliable, stylish, and ready-to-drive car that bridges the gap between luxury and everyday utility.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating a consistent service history and exceptional structural integrity, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by both reliability and performance. Our comprehensive multi-point inspection confirms that this automobile adheres to rigorous standards of mechanical excellence, ensuring it remains a distinguished and dependable choice for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, demonstrating a high level of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. This unit has undergone a rigorous professional assessment to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and performance. Representing a significant value proposition within its class, this vehicle offers a refined driving experience for the sophisticated buyer who prioritizes both quality and value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it has been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape—well-loved, dependable, and runs like a dream. It's perfect for someone looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road. I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you're going to love it as much as I have! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the iconic S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through its six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain remains crisp, with recent valve shim adjustments and a documented VANOS overhaul. Power is delivered via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual to a variable M-differential. The chassis has been proactively addressed with subframe reinforcement plates, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral load. Suspension components feature refreshed bushings and dampers, maintaining the factory-intended kinematic balance. A mechanically sound example optimized for driver engagement.
2019 SUV. Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance records available. Minor exterior wear. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a driver seeking a well-maintained, dependable companion that balances performance with everyday practicality. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though it shows the honest character of a car that has been enjoyed, with only minor road peppering on the front fascia consistent with careful highway use. Step inside to find a cabin that has been treated with meticulous care; the upholstery remains supple and free of major blemishes, and all interior electronics—including the premium infotainment system and dual-zone climate control—function exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of regular synthetic oil changes and a recent comprehensive brake service. It handles the road with confidence, offering a tight steering feel and a suspension that absorbs imperfections with ease. This is a solid, honest car that is ready for its next chapter and requires no immediate mechanical attention.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been meticulously maintained, ensuring reliable performance and a sophisticated driving experience. It represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of luxury and value.
